programme.title: When God Gives A Thought To You

programme.title: The Hardest Part Is Behind You

programme.title: Not As Long As My Song!

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God’s trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn’t the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Col. Nick Nichols from Folds of Honor and Olympic skeet shooter Dania Vizzi are both proud Americans who have represented their country overseas. Col. Nichols commanded the air in the cockpit of a fighter jet for countless missions during his seven combat tours and Dania donned the stars and bars proudly on her shooting vest as an Olympian in Paris. Now with Winchesters in hand, both are in the Midwest whitetail woods during late November during the back end of the rut hoping to connect on a Missouri monarch.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew travels to Kodiak Island, Alaska, in pursuit of blacktail deer in some of the most remote terrain they’ve faced. After a multi-day journey by air and sea, they arrive in a landscape defined by steep mountains, thick brush, and ever-changing weather. Once on the ground, the team confirms their setups and puts Winchester’s Supreme Long Range ammunition to the test as they glass expansive hillsides, pick apart coastal terrain, and carefully plan each move. From quick opportunities along the shoreline to calculated stalks in the high country, every moment demands focus and precision. Against the backdrop of Alaska’s wild beauty, this episode highlights the challenge, the strategy, and the performance it takes to capitalize when the opportunity finally comes together.

programme.title: Full Strut

programme.title: Hunting Land Man

Slade and Ryan also do some Pre-Deer season work, and establish where the fall food-plots will be!

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: Sheriff Mark Lamb (Surviving Mann) and UFC Hall of Famer Ken Shamrock (Surviving Mann) uncover a breakthrough changing how we live in a world full of invisible forces. Join them as Aires Tech reveals the science behind a revolutionary technology built to protect the human body from electromagnetic stress—empowering performance in a wired world.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The day begins with a powerful dose of perspective as contestants hear real-life breaching stories from American heroes—reminders of the stakes they’re preparing for. The team is then introduced to a concealed firearm headrest safe designed for rapid-response vehicle defense. Next, it’s straight into the action with a preliminary course of fire using GreenLight sights, where top performers are pushed even further with a bonus round to test speed, accuracy, and composure under pressure. The intensity ramps up during a sentry scenario featuring SABRE CO₂ non-lethal cartridges, putting their stealth and judgment to the test. But just as the dust begins to settle, a new CIA briefing drops—and it’s the most dire yet. With mission reality closing in fast, the contestants close the day with a crash course in S.E.R.E. (Survival, Evasion, Resistance, and Escape) training, rounding out their classroom combat readiness with hard-earned grit.

programme.title: Seasons of Lake Tahoe
programme.desc:
Enjoy Seasons of Lake Tahoe Free in February. Relax and unwind with the spectacular scenery of Lake Tahoe. This 3 hour film explores the dramatic beauty of one of the world's most beautiful locations. Experience brilliant turquoise waters, snowy wonderlands, slow motion waterfalls, sunny beaches, and exhilarating aerial views in this breathtaking film. Feel your worries melt away, your heart rate slow, and breath deepen with each relaxing scene.

programme.title: Preview For Mountain Biking Through Slovenia's Countryside
programme.desc:
Experience the quiet beauty of Slovenia by bike in this immersive preview featuring rolling alpine meadows, traditional shepherd huts, and peaceful mountain valleys. This short film highlights scenic cycling routes through Velika Planina, one of Slovenia’s most iconic high-altitude pastures, and the lush valley surrounding Kranjska Gora, framed by the dramatic Julian Alps. From gentle gravel roads to wide-open landscapes, this journey captures the rhythm, freedom, and restorative calm of biking through Slovenia’s countryside. 🌿 This is a preview of a longer cycling and nature film. 🎬 Watch the full-length, commercial-free experience on NatureStream.tv, with access to over 100 hours of immersive 4K nature journeys from around the world. ✨ What you’ll see in this preview:
Scenic countryside cycling in Slovenia Alpine meadows, valleys, and mountain backdrops Peaceful, slow-travel visuals designed for relaxation and inspiration
🚴‍♀️ Ideal for:
Nature lovers & cyclists Travel inspiration & slow TV fans Relaxation, background ambience, or mindful viewing

programme.title: S1E1 Animals
programme.desc: GoPro Animals delivers heartwarming, hilarious, and jaw-dropping moments from the animal world. From Golden Retrievers, French Bulldogs, and Border Collies bringing endless puppy smiles, to rescuing orcas and swimming with humpback whales, this show has it all. Wildlife photographer Chris Barnard captures the wild up close, even surviving a giraffe’s mighty kick. Plus, join Ocean Conservation Namibia as they race to save seals trapped in deadly ocean debris. A must-watch for every animal lover.

programme.title: S2E1 Animals

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.
